final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing detailed exploded-view technical illustration of a Sony A7 camera showing all its components.

Style/medium: needs a technical exploded-view diagram aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be exploded/disassembled layout with all parts spread out and labeled
Subject: must include the Sony A7 camera fully disassembled into all its individual components with part names labeled
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include part/component names as labels for each piece (in Spanish)
Constraints: must preserve all major and minor components of the Sony A7 visible and identifiable; labels must connect clearly to each corresponding part
Avoid:
